# neon-fx

Chainable Web Audio API plugins with standardized interface.

## Import

```javascript
import { Filter, Compressor, Reverb, PluginChain } from '../neon-fx/index.js';
```

## Quick Start

```javascript
const ctx = new AudioContext();

const filter = new Filter(ctx, { cutoff: 2000, resonance: 10 });
const comp = new Compressor(ctx, { threshold: -18, ratio: 4 });
const reverb = new Reverb(ctx, { mix: 30, decay: 2 });

// Chain
const chain = new PluginChain(ctx);
chain.add(filter).add(comp).add(reverb);

// Connect
source.connect(chain.input);
chain.connect(ctx.destination);

// Adjust (value, rampTimeSeconds)
filter.setParam('cutoff', 1000, 0.1);

// Bypass
filter.bypassed = true;
```

## Plugins

### Filter
```javascript
new Filter(ctx, { type: 'lowpass', cutoff: 1000, resonance: 0 })
// types: lowpass|highpass|bandpass|lowshelf|highshelf|peaking|notch|allpass
// cutoff: 20-20000 Hz
// resonance: 0-100
```

Variants: `LowpassFilter`, `HighpassFilter`, `BandpassFilter`

### Saturation
```javascript
new Saturation(ctx, { drive: 50, mode: 'soft', mix: 100 })
// drive: 0-100
// mode: soft|tube|tape|hard
// mix: 0-100 (dry/wet)
```

### Compressor
```javascript
new Compressor(ctx, { threshold: -24, ratio: 4, attack: 10, release: 100, gain: 0 })
// threshold: -60 to 0 dB
// ratio: 1-20
// attack: 0-100 ms
// release: 10-1000 ms
// gain: -12 to 12 dB (makeup)
```

### Limiter
```javascript
new Limiter(ctx, { threshold: -3, release: 100 })
```

### Sidechain
```javascript
new Sidechain(ctx, { amount: 80, attack: 5, release: 100 })
// Requires trigger input: sidechain.triggerInput

const sidechain = new Sidechain(ctx);
kickSource.connect(sidechain.triggerInput);
bassSource.connect(sidechain.input);
```

### RhythmicSidechain
```javascript
new RhythmicSidechain(ctx, { amount: 80, rate: 4, curve: 50, sync: true })
// rate: 1-16 (beats)
// curve: 0-100 (shape)
// Call .setBPM(120) for sync
```

### Reverb
```javascript
new Reverb(ctx, { mix: 30, decay: 2, preDelay: 10, damping: 50 })
// mix: 0-100
// decay: 0.1-10 seconds
// preDelay: 0-100 ms
// damping: 0-100
```

Variants: `PlateReverb`, `HallReverb`, `RoomReverb`

### AdaptiveNoise
```javascript
new AdaptiveNoise(ctx, { type: 'vinyl', level: 30, reactive: true })
// type: vinyl|tape|radio|digital
// level: 0-100
// reactive: responds to input level
```

## Plugin Interface

All plugins extend `AudioPlugin`:

```javascript
plugin.input           // GainNode - connect source here
plugin.output          // GainNode - connect to destination
plugin.connect(dest)   // Connect output to destination/plugin
plugin.disconnect()    // Disconnect output
plugin.bypassed        // Get/set bypass state
plugin.setParam(name, value, rampTime)  // Set parameter with optional ramp
plugin.getParam(name)  // Get current parameter value
plugin.destroy()       // Cleanup

// Static metadata
Plugin.id              // 'filter'
Plugin.name            // 'Filter'
Plugin.parameterDefinitions  // [{ name, label, min, max, default, unit, scale }]
```

## Chains

### PluginChain (series)
```javascript
const chain = new PluginChain(ctx);
chain.add(plugin1).add(plugin2);
chain.remove(plugin1);
chain.clear();
chain.plugins  // Array of plugins
```

### ParallelChain
```javascript
const parallel = new ParallelChain(ctx);
parallel.add(reverb, 0.5);   // plugin, gain
parallel.add(delay, 0.3);
```

## Dynamic Creation

```javascript
import { createPlugin, getAvailablePlugins } from '../neon-fx/index.js';

const ids = getAvailablePlugins();  // ['filter', 'compressor', ...]
const plugin = await createPlugin('filter', ctx, { cutoff: 1000 });
```

## Registry IDs

filter, lowpass-filter, highpass-filter, bandpass-filter, saturation,
compressor, limiter, sidechain, rhythmic-sidechain, adaptive-noise,
reverb, plate-reverb, hall-reverb, room-reverb
